style_guidelines.color_palette: Deep black base (#0a0a0a), luminous accent colors (electric blue #00d4ff, neon purple #bf5af2), subtle gray gradients
style_guidelines.typography: Elegant sans-serif, dramatic size contrast (72pt+ headlines, 18pt body), pure white text
style_guidelines.imagery: Dramatic studio lighting, rim lights and edge glow, cinematic product shots, abstract light trails
style_guidelines.layout: Generous negative space (60%+), asymmetric balance, single focal point per slide
style_guidelines.effects: Subtle ambient glow, light bloom effects, grain texture overlay (2-3% opacity), vignette on edges
